explainability.findings: An advisory action plan discusses challenges associated with machine learning explainability. This highlights considerations for understanding AI model decisions.
explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

relevant_sources.summary: This advisory action plan provides evidence for **explainability**, **fairness**, **governance**, **oversight**, **privacy**, and **transparency**. The document discusses challenges with ML explainability and bias propagation, and commits to ethical and equitable AI use, data privacy, and the development of governance frameworks. It also outlines the establishment of an interagency group for AI governance and oversight, and details AI exposure measures and methodologies, contributing to transparency.
relevant_sources.title: The Governor's Task Force on Workforce and Artificial Intelligence Advisory Action Plan

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.findings: An advisory action plan discusses challenges related to bias propagation in machine learning. This plan also commits to the ethical and equitable use of AI.
fairness.path_to_improvement: Publish bias testing results, outcome monitoring, or vendor fairness certifications.

relevant_sources.summary: This advisory action plan provides evidence for **explainability**, **fairness**, **governance**, **oversight**, **privacy**, and **transparency**. governance.findings: An advisory action plan commits to the development of governance frameworks for AI. It also outlines the establishment of an interagency group specifically for AI governance and oversight.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

oversight.findings: An advisory action plan outlines the establishment of an interagency group. This group is intended for AI governance and oversight.
oversight.path_to_improvement: Publish override mechanisms, escalation processes, or appeal workflows.

privacy.findings: An advisory action plan commits to upholding data privacy. This commitment is part of broader responsible AI practices.
privacy.path_to_improvement: Publish AI-specific privacy impact assessments or data handling procedures.

transparency.findings: An advisory action plan details AI exposure measures and methodologies. This plan contributes to transparency regarding AI practices.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Publish detailed documentation (model cards, system specs) for AI systems deployed.

summary.overall_findings: Oshkosh's public disclosures include an advisory action plan detailing AI exposure measures and methodologies for transparency. These materials address 5 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars, with governance disclosures committing to the development of governance frameworks and outlining the establishment of an interagency group for AI governance and oversight. Further policy-level commitments include an advisory action plan discussing challenges with bias propagation for fairness and a commitment to data privacy. No qualifying public evidence was found for explainability or external accountability. The assessment draws on a review of 12 publicly available sources.
